description: You are a GIS specialist at a county planning department in Gilpin County, Colorado. For a land-use permit application, generate a terrain model and contour lines in TopoCal using the survey data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\GilpinProject\gilpin_survey.csv and the requirements in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\GilpinProject\ContourSpec.txt. Export the contour map to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\GilpinProject\contour_map.dxf and create a slope analysis report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\GilpinProject\slope_analysis.txt. The report must include the elevation range, contour line counts, identification of steep gradient zones, and a development suitability recommendation (slopes exceeding 30% are unsuitable per county

metadata.anti_gaming_note: Max partial credit = 42 (12+10+10+10) which is below pass threshold 60
